summary: Completed comprehensive testing of updated Sadafal Tech landing page. All major requirements verified: Calendly widget embedded inline in booking section, WhatsApp floating button positioned correctly, all CTA buttons link to #book section. Minor scroll positioning issue identified but functionality works.

integration_issues.issue: Scroll positioning slightly off - lands near but not exactly at booking section top

passed_tests: Backend API GET /api/ returns correct message
Backend API POST /api/bookings creates bookings successfully
Backend API GET /api/bookings retrieves bookings successfully
WhatsApp floating button positioned fixed bottom-right with correct styling
WhatsApp button links to https://wa.me/919879113429 with prefilled message
WhatsApp button opens in new tab (target='_blank')
Navigation CTA button links to #book
Hero CTA button (inside anchor) links to #book
VSL CTA button (inside anchor) links to #book
Final CTA button (inside anchor) links to #book
Calendly widget container present in booking section
Calendly inline widget div with correct class found
Calendly iframe loads successfully with sadafaltech/30min URL
Calendly script loads from assets.calendly.com
CTA buttons scroll to booking section (functional but positioning slightly off)
FAQ accordion expand/collapse functionality working correctly
Hero section elements all visible: headline, subheadline, VSL video, stats
Mobile responsive: hamburger menu visible and functional
Mobile responsive: WhatsApp button visible on mobile
Mobile menu opens and shows navigation items
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (3/3 APIs working), Frontend: 95% (minor scroll positioning issue)
